$comment: c51 (D-FFI-PTHREAD-CREATE-JOIN): ship pthread_create + pthread_join from <pthread.h> — sqlite's threaded sorter (sqlite3.c:35646 pthread_create(&p->tid,0,xTask,pIn) + pthread_join). The mutex API + pthread_self/equal + the opaque pthread_mutex_t/_t typedefs were shipped c14/c15; only these two were missing -> S0001. pthread_create: fn(ptr<void>,ptr<void>,ptr<void>,ptr<void>)->i32; pthread_join: fn(u64,ptr<void>)->i32 (pthread_t BY VALUE = u64, the pthread_self/equal ABI). The start routine is passed as a fn-POINTER var (sqlite's xTask shape) -> the Ptr->void* arm (bare function->void* is a SEPARATE unshipped gap). worker sets g=42 + the thread is created/joined on real libc -> exit 42. Gated [elf,macho] (pthread is unix; pe uses os_win). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove either symbol from pthread.json -> S0001. 3-leg note: the thread must actually RUN on WSL-elf + qemu-arm64, not just compile.
